title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 408.081 - Validity of certain existing contract not to be affected, when
text:
408.081.  Validity of certain existing contract not to be affected, when. — Nothing in sections 408.035, 408.036 and 408.080 shall affect the validity of any contract in existence on August 28, 1992.
(L. 1992 S.B. 688)
